reviews.review_description:
This was a great app for all users around the world! It’s a pitty it was removed, While not offering Horizon Worlds as a replacement!

Still waiting like 2 years for Horizon Worlds to appear in Sweden, but I guess we Will not see it here! Meta is now dropping even more great titles lately so it’s worrying!

When it worked it was nice. It was cool being able to go to events. Now I don't even know why it's listed anymore because it doesn't do anything. You install it, click on it, and it just sends you to Horizon Worlds, which isn't even available.
Then to make matters worse, they keep advertising all these events we can't even attend because we don't have Horizon Worlds. Dumb, very dumb. They should've just left Horizon Venues alone. 🙄
Tired of waiting. Why announce and make so much advertisement for something we can not use in Germany. Disappointed.

reviews.review_title: The harrassing kids  got to be banned
reviews.review_description: Need to ban these kids who act obnoxious and bombard you calling you names unprovoked and won’t leave you alone. It ruins the whole experience. Start banning them and they will quite this immature behavior.  Suggestion, make a setting for parents to make the VR sensored for children and make a venue specifically for adults.
The concert was a lot better than I expected.
I’m returning my oculus just bought it only to use this app to watch nba games and can’t even get past the create avatar screen. Trash app with trash support
The wrist would not work when lifting left hand?
I don’t have Facebook so I can’t play it so I just got it for no reason I’m upset

reviews.review_title: I went to the club tonight
reviews.review_description: Threw up on a bunch of strangers smoked something weird and had a blast .   ......best vr app ever

Just got my Quest 2 and I'm still in the "awe phase" of seeing all this VR stuff. To me, it's really cool. Keep in mind I'm 34 and have never experienced VR before, so yea, something like this is... awesome. But I agree with other users that should be age restricted areas. I didn't run in to too many young folks on my first "play through", but I heard them pop up as I was walking around talking to people and I thought... I'm an adult, talking to other adults, about adult stuff, using adult language... kids shouldn't just be popping in and out. 

But that aside, this was a pretty cool experience. Watching some "live" comedy, seeing other people around in their avatars, chatting, laughing, having fun. It really is a social experience. 

Are you a shy person? This would be a phenomenal tool to help you get over that.

I like the concept of virtually attending live events but listening to others I don’t know ruins the entire experience. There needs to be private room option. I couldn’t get past the first five minutes of a Spurs game. Not to mention other avatars blocking my view. Just like in the real world!
Great app in progress, it is in beta stage so if will only get better. As for the other bad reviews just mute and block others
Its Not working in germany i hope it will be soon
It’s awesome, I had a lot of fun, it’s definitely a great start as a Beta
Will not allow me to log in atall
So I created  my avatar  and  got to playing   and  noticed  others  had way better  clothes and  accessories... confused  cause  I only  have  plane basic  stuff  where do I acquire  this

This app is nice but it needs age ristricions you should be able to make different profile for different kids. Kids should NOT be mingling with adults this is a really nice app but it really really needs a lot of work you as an adult should be able to go on under your own adult profile via Facebook but you should be able to set up profiles for your underage children and if you're linking this to your Facebook account teenagers should be with teenagers adults with adults and so forth.
Just finished watching the Bulls n Hornets  Game,it was WILD ! ,MET 3 NEW Friends ,Man! What an Experience!!

View gets obstructed by the fake walls they put up and the feed itself just isn’t high enough resolution to really see anything. The constant camera shifting just makes it even worse. In the long run it has potential if they can fix that

reviews.review_title: I’m a dude and my avatar was a woman
reviews.review_description: Signed in with Facebook, which clearly has my gender as male but this app defaulted my avatar to female and would allow me to change it. Strange that it doesn’t allow me to change the gender of my avatar. Anyway, not comfortable using this app this way.
